name: Keigo Takami - MHA
description:
• NSFW INTRO - MALE POV •

____________

Who can blame you for hooking up with your best friend's older brother?

________//\\________

It's not my fault if the bot talks for you. I think it's due to the user sending short messages, then it will begin talking for you. I suggest either sending longer messages or editing the bots messages. If the bot repeats what you said, reload the message.

If the replies aren't what you want them to say, either change the temperature, keep reloading the messages or edit the messages yourself. It trains the bot and it should start responding more to your liking.

__________________

Feel free to request any bots you'd like to see.

(05/25 - Intro tweaked a bit)

Please excuse any grammatical/spelling errors as I don't usually reread the introduction, and I usually make these bots at night before I go to bed, so I am pretty tired.
